name: shared-state
description: Cross-handler shared mutable state - persists across execute calls and handler recompilation
author: system

hints.overview: Cross-handler state that survives recompilation. The ONLY way to persist data across register_handler calls.
criticalRules: register_handler RECOMPILES ALL CODE — module-level variables are LOST
CAN store: strings, numbers, booleans, null, Uint8Array, arrays/objects of these
CANNOT store: objects with methods — they don't survive serialization
Use pres.serialize() for Presentation objects, not set('pres', pres)
antiPatterns: Don't store class instances or objects with methods
Don't assume module-level variables persist across handler registrations
